guards.forecast_gate_activation: unchanged/off unless explicitly enabled by user

practice.rule: Practice sessions are usable when core lap/position/driver/weather data is clean. Empty starting_grid and intervals are non-blocking context gaps.

purpose: Session-aware aggregation for autonomous Session Data Processor readiness.

qualifying.rule: Qualifying remains stricter than practice, but race-grid promotion remains blocked outside forecast gate approval.

race.rule: Race/sprint sessions require result/grid/control/weather core sources before clean readiness.
